column3: ['Verify that the remote pilot is enrolled in the correct training program. ', 'Verify that the remote pilot completes all required syllabi for their specific use case. ', 'Verify that the operator confirms the completion of necessary training. ']
column4: ["The system displays the remote pilot's name and confirms they are enrolled in a valid training program. ", "All mandatory coursework relevant to the remote pilot's intended role is marked as completed within the system. ", "The operator acknowledges and records the remote pilot's successful completion of their training program in the system. "]
